technical_replicate: Bottom-up LC-MS/MS was conducted by injecting 1 μg total peptides
experimental_design: 1 h digestion at 47 °C with calcium vs overnight digestion at 37 °C
we demonstrate that a 1 h digestion at 47 °C with 10 mM Ca2+
factor_value: Inclusion of 10 mM calcium chloride contributes a maximal 86% increase
number_of_fractions: subject to reversed phase LC-UV clean-up with total peptide quantitation from A214 and fraction collection in 45% acetonitrile
